questions.question: What will the temperature be tomorrow?
questions.answer:
For tomorrow (2026-03-28) in Lithuania: adjusted estimate 5.5°C (baseline 2.9°C). Climatological baseline for 2026-03-28: 2.9°C
Year-to-date (86 days observed): 2026 is running 4.1°C colder than the model expects.
Most recent 30-day window: 2.6°C warmer than expected.
Bias-adjusted estimate for tomorrow: 5.5°C
Note: this is a climatological trend estimate, not a live weather forecast.
questions.interpretation: Baseline: 2.9°C | YTD bias: -4.1°C | Recent 30d bias: +2.6°C | Adjusted: 5.5°C

questions.question: Is Lithuania currently warmer or colder than normal?
questions.answer: Based on retrieved DAG outputs, Lithuania Heating Degree Days Full year 2024: 3225.2 HDD total, versus a 1991-2020 baseline of 3893.6 HDD (anomaly -668.5 HDD). Lithuania Weather Summary

questions.question: How unusual is this March in Vilnius?
questions.answer: Based on retrieved DAG outputs, Vilnius March Temperature Anomalies Vilnius March through day 26 in 2026 has mean temperature 4.87 C, an anomaly of 4.25 C, and z-score 1.49.
questions.interpretation: A z-score of +1.49 is anomalous — outside typical variability.

questions.question: Can I trust the climate model outputs?
questions.answer: Based on retrieved DAG outputs, The climate model reports R2 0.7756, RMSE 4.1936, and MAE 3.2521 on held-out data.
